archetypes.label: Early Adopter
archetypes.behavior_template: Loves trying new things. High tolerance for bugs. Influences others if happy.

archetypes.label: Skeptic
archetypes.behavior_template: Looks for reasons to fail. Compares with established alternatives. Needs proof.

archetypes.label: Niche Influencer
archetypes.behavior_template: First to review. Their opinion sets the tone for a large audience.

archetypes.label: Tech Journalist
archetypes.behavior_template: Looks for a unique story. Will highlight both major innovation and major failure.

archetypes.label: Competitor Sales Rep
archetypes.behavior_template: Attempts to sow doubt about the new product. Highlights own product's stability.

archetypes.label: Support Agent
archetypes.behavior_template: Handles incoming complaints and confusion. Gauge of launch friction.
